title: 持久化批次与输入准备

run.note: Host has CUDA + Triton, so the GPU/Triton tests in test_prepare_inputs_gpu.py ran natively (not skipped, not deferred to container). No vllm import is needed — the reduced companion is self-contained — so the container path was not required.

environment.gpu: NVIDIA RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell Workstation Edition

container.reason: Reduced companion does not import vllm; host CUDA+Triton present, so the real @triton.jit slot-mapping kernel ran on host.

test_prepare_inputs_gpu.py: test_slot_mapping_formula PASSED (real Triton kernel on CUDA)
test_end_to_end_prefill_gather PASSED (real Triton kernel on CUDA)
test_decode_step_positions_advance PASSED (real Triton kernel on CUDA)

behavior_alignment: BatchUpdateBuilder.removed sorted descending / pop_removed returns lowest index — verified against real vllm/v1/sample/logits_processor/state.py (docstring + _ensure_removed_sorted): test asserts removed==[3,1] and slot reuse 1 then 3.
remove only punches a hole (no compaction); condense slides tail-most live request into smallest hole so [0,num_reqs) is dense — matches gpu_input_batch.py condense.
flat token_indices = positions + req_index*max_model_len for torch.index_select gather — matches _prepare_inputs np.repeat req_indices path.

slot_mapping = block_table[req,pos//bs]*bs + pos%bs, tail padded PAD_SLOT_ID — verified against real _compute_slot_mapping_kernel with TOTAL_CP_WORLD_SIZE==1 (is_local always true, local_block_offsets==pos%block_size, last program pads to PAD_ID).

lint_fidelity.result: 保真度检查全部通过 (no BLOCKING)
